examples: It is not every day that one meets a businessperson who is not obsessed with Mammon.
Edmund Spenser in The Faerie Queene does not bring Sir Guyon with his palmer through the cave of Mammon.
Let's look at a later manifestation of Mammon.
Slightly odd to be punishing God for the sins of Mammon really but there we go.
It is necessary to have a better argument than a distaste for Mammon before changing the world so much.
